<|file_sep|>README.md
# 🌐 Multi-lingual Text Classification

This repository contains the code and resources for the paper:

**"Multi-lingual Text Classification: A Comprehensive Benchmark and Analysis"**

## 📄 Paper

You can find the paper on [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.10467).

## 📊 Dataset

The dataset used in this study is available on [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/datasets/ChenWen98/multi-lingual-text-classification).

## 📝 Abstract

Text classification is a fundamental task in natural language processing (NLP) that involves categorizing text into predefined categories. While significant progress has been made in English text classification, the performance of models on non-English languages remains underexplored. In this paper, we present a comprehensive benchmark and analysis of multi-lingual text classification. We evaluate a range of state-of-the-art models on a diverse set of languages and domains, providing insights into the challenges and opportunities in this area. Our results highlight the importance of considering language-specific characteristics and the potential for transfer learning in multi-lingual text classification.

## 🚀 Usage

To use the code and resources in this repository, follow these steps:

1. Clone the repository:
    ```bash
    git clone https://github.com/ChenWen98/multi-lingual-text-classification.git
    ```
2. Install the required dependencies:
    ```bash
    pip install -r requirements.txt
    ```
3. Run the code:
    ```bash
    python main.py
    ```

## 📚 Citation

If you use this dataset or code in your research, please cite our paper:

```bibtex
@article{wen2024multi,
  title={Multi-lingual Text Classification: A Comprehensive Benchmark and Analysis},
  author={Wen, Chen and others},
  journal={arXiv preprint arXiv:2406.10467},
  year={2024}
}
```

## 🤝 Contributing

We welcome contributions! Please feel free to submit a pull request or open an issue for any questions or suggestions.

## 📜 License

This project is licensed under the MIT License.
